center.name: Thomas Campbell Eyton
center.summary: Thomas Campbell Eyton是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括栗胸鸭、Cinnamon-throated woodcreeper、Scimitar-billed woodcreeper等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The cinnamon-throated woodcreeper (Dendrexetastes rufigula) is a sub-oscine passerine bird in subfamily Dendrocolaptinae of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The scimitar-billed woodcreeper (Drymornis bridgesii) is a species of bird in the subfamily Dendrocolaptinae of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut teal (Anas castanea) is a dabbling duck found in Australia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black paradise flycatcher (Terpsiphone atrocaudata), also known as the Japanese paradise flycatcher, is a medium-sized passerine bird native to southeastern Asia
